jd_text: Director – Strategic Partnerships A senior leader is required to help shape and elevate a well-established academic brand on a global stage. This role will focus on building strong partnerships, driving reputation, and strengthening relationships with key stakeholders and international ranking bodies. You’ll ideally bring a solid background in corporate communications, partnerships, and brand strategy – experience within higher education or research environments is a big plus. Previous exposure to global rankings (QS, THE, etc.) would be highly valuable. Strong communication skills are key, along with a collaborative, forward-thinking mindset and the ability to thrive in a diverse, international environment. Open to candidates based outside the UAE (relocation/travel required), but excellent English is essential. This role will include significant travel. To apply for this role, please submit a copy of your CV.
